data.title: Polyglot Review & Skill Agents: replace Python-specific references in reviewer prompts and skill files
data.description:
## Context
The 9 code reviewer agents suppress Python-specific linter output by hardcoding tool names (ruff, mypy, make lint-ruff, make lint-mypy) in their prompts. When TypeScript, Ruby, or Java teams submit PRs, valid findings from ESLint, tsc, or RuboCop get silently dismissed because the suppression rules match the wrong output. reviewer-base.md at lines 38-44 names make lint-ruff, make lint-mypy, ruff check, mypy as tools to suppress; at line 196 says 'Do NOT report ruff/mypy/format violations.' reviewer-delta-light.md lines 98-109 has language-specific ruff/mypy suppression blocks. REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md at lines 85-86 hardcodes make lint-ruff and make lint-mypy as the lint/type-check invocation examples. DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md documents pip-audit but omits npm audit and bundle-audit. This epic replaces all of these with language-neutral equivalents.

## Success Criteria
- reviewer-base.md updated: lines 38-44 (replace ruff/mypy tool names with 'the project's configured linter and type checker') and line 196 (replace 'Do NOT report ruff/mypy/format violations' with generic language)
- reviewer-delta-light.md 'Linter Suppression Rules' section (lines 98-109) updated to generic language; line 33-34 ('ruff format/check') updated; pass/fail: no ruff or mypy terms in suppression sections
- Run build-review-agents.sh to regenerate all 9 agent files; confirmed pass/fail: all 9 files contain no ruff/mypy/lint-ruff/lint-mypy terms in Do Not/suppression sections; all contain 'configured linter' language
- REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md lines 85-86 updated (replace make lint-ruff / make lint-mypy invocations); lines 10-11 default values updated to not hardcode Python-specific commands
- DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md extended: pip-audit (pip-audit --strict), npm audit (npm audit --audit-level=moderate), bundle-audit (bundle-audit check --update); all 3 entries present with named invocation form
- commands.lint_ruff and commands.lint_mypy config keys NOT renamed, aliased, or removed (validate.sh reads these at lines 122-123)
- ci-failure-validation-state.md retains lint_ruff and lint_mypy field names; add legacy comment adjacent to field definitions
- Validation: grep -rL 'ruff|mypy|lint-ruff|lint-mypy' plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-light.md returns empty AND grep -rL same for code-reviewer-standard.md returns empty; both files contain 'configured linter'

## Dependencies
Soft ordering prerequisites (both keys already exist in the codebase today):
- Epic A (87e9-0bc8): landing before Epic A means REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md references a planned but not yet finalized commands.test_runner
- Epic B (3818-310d): landing before Epic B means prose referencing commands.lint describes planned but not yet deployed defaults

## Approach
Edit reviewer-base.md and reviewer-delta-light.md to replace hardcoded Python tool names with generic language. Run build-review-agents.sh to propagate changes to all 9 generated agent files. Update REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md and DEPENDENCY-GUIDANCE.md. Preserve all existing config key names to avoid breaking validate.sh.
